task_completion.description: Verify the User Group is created with the correct ID, Name, and Description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form or list in the Vicidial interface showing Group ID 'SUP_SECURE', Group Name 'Secure Supervisors', and Description 'Restricted Reporting Access'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Force Change Password' setting is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Force Change Password' field in the User Group configuration form and ensure it is set to 'Y'.

task_completion.description: Verify that access to the 'Agent Performance Detail' report is allowed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the report permissions/allowed reports section and ensure 'Agent Performance Detail' (or 'AST_agent_performance_detail.php') is checked, selected, or set to '1'/'Y'.

task_completion.description: Verify that access to the 'Real-Time Main Report' is allowed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the report permissions/allowed reports section and ensure 'Real-Time Main Report' (or 'AST_timeonVDADall.php') is checked, selected, or set to '1'/'Y'.

task_completion.description: Verify that all 'Export' reports are blocked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look through the report permissions section and ensure that any report containing the word 'Export' is unchecked, unselected, or set to '0'/'N'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Vicidial web interface to configure the user group.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Vicidial admin web interface in a web browser, not terminal commands or direct database queries (e.g., MySQL CLI).

integrity.description: Ensure the settings were actually saved or submitted.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a confirmation message indicating the User Group was added or modified, or verify that the settings persist in the form after a save action.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't just type the expected outcomes into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration must be visible within the actual Vicidial HTML form fields, not in a notepad, text editor, or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Group ID is 'SUP_SECURE'. The allowed reports 'Agent Performance Detail' and 'Real-Time Main Report' correspond to the underlying scripts 'AST_agent_performance_detail.php' and 'AST_timeonVDADall.php' in the Vicidial interface. All reports containing the keyword 'export' must be disabled. 'Force Change Password' must be set to 'Y'.
